title: User prompt
description: The inbound request envelope every external request carries. One schema, one shape, one set of fields.

schema_uuid.description: Stable UUID identifying THIS schema version. Pinned constant per schema_library_version.

prompt_uuid.description: Per-instance UUID minted by the caller for this single request. Audit/trace join key.

model.description: Optional model hint. Free-form string per OpenAI / LiteLLM convention (e.g. "claude-sonnet-4-6"). Gateway has final say.
